# Release Summary

One or two sentences on what changed and why this release matters.

## Highlights

- highlight the most meaningful user-facing or operator-facing improvements
- mention any new commands, workflows, or docs that materially improve adoption
- call out important fixes or behavior changes

## Install or Upgrade

```bash
npm install -g agent-control-plane
agent-control-plane help
```

Or use `npx` directly:

```bash
npx agent-control-plane@latest help
```

## Verification

- list the key checks run before release
- mention `npm pack --dry-run` if relevant
- mention smoke or runtime checks if relevant

## Notes

- mention migration steps if any
- mention known limitations if any
- link to `CHANGELOG.md` for the fuller history
